question.label: Communication feedback
question.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?
question.description: Drills into the feedback thread to locate the specific issue and whether it is about expectations, delivery, or confidence.

answer: I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.

assessment.note: Wants earlier room to lead cross-functional discussions, which signals a clear growth opportunity she is currently not getting; wellbeing not addressed.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week right now?

new_queue.label: Next-step move
new_queue.name: What would you most like to have moving differently by our next check-in?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
